title: (Sr./Staff) Algorithm Engineer (Computer Vision)
description:
OMNIVISION is a leading developer of advanced digital imaging solutions for a variety of industrial and consumer markets such as automotive, medical imaging, mobile devices, surveillance, AR/VR/drones/robotics, and notebook & entertainment.

Position Overview:

  • We are seeking an Algorithm Engineer to research and develop advanced computer vision and deep learning algorithms for imaging applications.

Responsibilities:

  1. Research, develop, and optimize computer vision and deep learning algorithms for image applications such as object recognition, video analytics, and image enhancement.
  2. Design and implement new algorithms/features using deep learning for CMOS image sensors based on product requirements.
  3. Test, validate, and integrate algorithms into camera pipelines or embedded systems.
  4. Stay current with state-of-the-art research and propose innovative solutions for vision and image quality challenges.

Experience & Skills:

  1. Ph.D. or M.S. (or equivalent experience) in Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, Computational Imaging, Applied Mathematics, or related fields.
  2. Broad knowledge of computer vision, deep learning, object recognition/tracking, or 3D reconstruction; experience with image sensors, ISP pipelines, color science, or image quality metrics is a plus.
  3. Proven experience in independent algorithm research; strong mathematical background preferred.
  4. Proficient in C/C++ and Python; familiar with deep learning frameworks.
  5. Excellent communication skills and ability to collaborate across teams.

postedCompany.description:
OmniVision has been committed to developing the most advanced CMOS image sensors and complete camera solutions. To achieve this mission, we continually search for talented individuals who work well in a fast-paced, results-oriented environment. This is how OmniVision has rapidly become one of the world's leading suppliers of CMOS image sensors to the global electronics industry, serving the world’s top digital camera and handset makers.


OmniVision is a unique workplace because it has the energy and excitement of a startup, while offering the stability and opportunities of an established company as we are today. In its 17 years of existence, the Company has seen dynamic growth, going from technology startup to the world’s largest CMOS image sensor supplier. Since inception, OmniVision has shipped more than four billion CameraChip™ image sensors.


By constantly adding new talent to our highly experienced teams of engineers, OmniVision continues to invest in its future, which reaches well beyond today’s popular camera applications such as camera phones and webcams. OmniVisions ability to set imaging trends today while also developing brand new applications and markets for tomorrow has enabled us to stay on top. Our CameraChip image sensors not only take your family pictures, they also advance diagnostic medicine and improve driver and passenger safety in cars. The possibilities for imaging are endless. Bring your ideas, expertise and enthusiasm to OmniVision and work with our talented engineering teams to define the future of digital imaging.
postedCompany.name: OMNIVISION TECHNOLOGIES SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
